description: OpenHands skill-creator workflow.research step 0 app prompt JSON output.

assert.value: (() => { let trimmed = output.trim(); const fenced = trimmed.match(/^```(?:json)?\s*([\s\S]*?)\s*```$/i); if (fenced) trimmed = fenced[1].trim(); if (!trimmed.startsWith('{') || !trimmed.endsWith('}')) return false; const data = JSON.parse(trimmed); const ro = data.research_output; const metadata = ro && ro.metadata; const plan = metadata && metadata.research_plan; return data.status === 'research_complete' && Number.isInteger(data.dimensions_selected) && data.dimensions_selected >= 0 && Number.isInteger(data.question_count) && ro && ro.version === '1' && metadata && Number.isInteger(metadata.question_count) && metadata.question_count === data.question_count && Array.isArray(metadata.priority_questions) && typeof metadata.scope_recommendation === 'boolean' && plan && Array.isArray(plan.selected_dimensions) && Array.isArray(plan.dimension_scores) && Number.isInteger(plan.dimensions_selected) && plan.dimensions_selected === data.dimensions_selected && Array.isArray(ro.sections) && Array.isArray(ro.notes) && Array.isArray(ro.answer_evaluator_notes); })()
